div1.entryFree: Exsufflicate, (O. Edd. exufflicate): when I shall turn the business of my soul to such e. and blown surmises, Oth. III, 3, 182. Dyce: "swollen, puffed out." Nares: "contemptible, abominable. From exsufflare, low Lat. which Du Cange explains 'contemnere, despuere, rejicere." Probably synonymous to blown, == empty, unsubstantial, frivolous.
